subcodes.first_line: My dear beloved one, the letter which you had written to Siyyid Asadu'llah was perused, and it indicated [3.5s]... ...For some time, even as birds without a nest or shelter, I wandered vast lands. At one time I was on the peaks of mountains and hills
subcodes.first_line_orig: عزیز مهربان من نامه که باسید اسدالله مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گشت دلالت بر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @suffering and imprisonment, @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha
